title: Nursery Rhyme. DXXV. Natural History.
content:
Hickety, pickety, my black hen,
        She lays eggs for gentlemen;
        Gentlemen come every day
        To see what my black hen doth lay.
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. DXXV. Natural History."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
